epic_name: datum pipeline infrastructure — route, awake, go, review, full TS workflow

commits.message: fix: closeout archives root pipeline artifacts (TASKS.md, lane-plan.json, etc.) to epic dir
feat: datum-route + model-agnostic tiers + enum types + pipeline fixes
fix: parseAgentJson resilient parsing + remove phantom datum-go phases
feat: datum-go orchestrator — chains all 7 workflows end-to-end
feat: full workflow pipeline — refine through closeout
feat: TICKET template + template extraction + headroom integration + append protocol
fix: pipeline hardening — verify gate, file ownership, gate --approve, yolo mode, SKILL.md trim
feat: wave_builder validation + yolo mode + checkpoint fix
fix(lint): fix syntax error and ruff violations in test_github_issues.py skeleton
ticket: fail-fast deterministic validation before tests
chore: archive stale gh-issues pipeline artifacts to epic dir

tasks.notes: TDD act did not run for this epic. Tasks were planned (task-001..task-006: gh-issues as source of truth) but pipeline work pivoted to infrastructure delivery. Tasks archived as stale.

brief_defects.defect: CORR-004: batch partitioning in datum-go ignores DAG wave boundaries; cross-batch sequential deps can produce hangs when MAX_BATCH cut splits intra-wave lanes
brief_defects.resolution: filed as follow-up — fix partition-by-waves in datum-go.ts

brief_defects.defect: SEC-001: ctx.branch and rid from agent JSON interpolated directly into shell commands in datum-closeout.ts — path traversal / command injection risk
brief_defects.resolution: filed as follow-up — add allowlist regex validation before interpolation

brief_defects.defect: CORR-007: gate_validate passes silently when .datum/last-test-signal.json missing — validate gate can green without any tests having run
brief_defects.resolution: filed as follow-up — fail when signal absent and not yolo

next_ticket.title: Fail-Fast Deterministic Validation Before Tests
next_ticket.summary: Add ruff + mypy pre-check in datum-tdd-act-lane before pytest to catch ~40% of errors sub-second

solutions: datum-route workflow: classifies spec into pipeline route (feature/hotfix/patch/epic) with model-agnostic tier selection
datum-awake workflow: codebase distillation → preamble injection into all agents
datum-go orchestrator: chains all 7 workflows end-to-end (route→awake→refine→plan→properties→act→closeout)
Full TS workflow pipeline: refine through closeout all ship as compiled JS
parseAgentJson resilient parsing: handles code fences, partial JSON, and phantom phases
Pipeline hardening: verify gate, file ownership, gate --approve, yolo mode, SKILL.md trim
wave_builder validation: cycle detection, structural validation before act dispatch
TICKET template extraction: headroom integration + append protocol for new tickets
Closeout self-archiving: root pipeline artifacts (TASKS.md, lane-plan.json) auto-archived to epic dir
